docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,885.12 FILED BY NYGARD, CAROL AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREAS, CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
